name: RMW - AK74
author: Mr. Rubyyy
description: Rubyyy's Modular Weaponry - The USSR realized that 5.56 was actually a nice cartridge so they made an AK for it. The predecessor to the M variant. This one still rocks the Bakelite furtnitre and can be used with a folding Stock.  (YOU CAN MODIFY THE STOCK NOW TOO!!!!) >CONTROLS< : [MMB-Fire Selector] [RMB-Aim Down Sight] [R-Reload] [T-Attachment Menu] [SHIFT-Canting/Sprint]
